---
title: "Marketing Analysis"
author: "Isha Mantri"
format: 
  html: default
  pdf: default
 
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
editor: visual
---

```{r}

#| include: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(lubridate)

```

```{r}

#| include: false
raw_data <- read_csv("data/36831700_Isha_Mantri.csv")
processed_data <- raw_data |>
    drop_na(purchase_amount) |>    
  mutate(
signup_date = parse_date_time(signup_date, orders = c("ymd", "dmy", "mdy", "b d, Y"))) |>
  select(-notes)
   

```
